Package com.example.eventlotterysystem.database

Class EventImageRepository

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.database.EventImageRepository
All Implemented Interfaces:
ImageRepository
public class EventImageRepository extends Object implements ImageRepository
Connecting event images to the firestore database.
